_doc: OmniSight MCP server registry (P12 #352). Local + remote MCP servers that the agent runtime, Claude Code projects, and downstream tooling can register with. Each entry follows the Claude Code/Anthropic MCP convention so the same JSON can be re-used as a project-level `.mcp.json` (copy or symlink) or imported by `backend/agents/tools.py` MCP loader (P12 checkbox 2).

android-skills._doc: android-skills-mcp (skydoves/android-skills-mcp, P12 #352 checkbox 1). Exposes `list_skills` / `search_skills` / `get_skill` tools — wraps the Google Android official Skills catalogue (Navigation 3 setup, AGP 9 migration, R8 config, etc.) so OmniSight android-kotlin / mobile agents can pull authoritative best-practice guidance into context. stdio mode (local subprocess); `-y` keeps `npx` non-interactive so the runtime never blocks waiting for an `Ok to proceed?` prompt.
